fields.definition_en: A statement, made without giving proof, that someone has done something wrong or illegal.
fields.example_en: Several people made allegations of corruption against the mayor.
fields.example_vi: Nhiều người đã đưa ra các cáo buộc tham nhũng đối với thị trưởng.
fields.mnemonic: An allegation is what you allege (claim) someone did.

fields.definition_en: To say that someone has done something illegal or wrong without giving proof.
fields.example_en: The prosecution alleges that she was driving carelessly.
fields.example_vi: Bên công tố cáo buộc rằng cô ấy đã lái xe bất cẩn.
fields.mnemonic: To say something is true before you have proof is to allege it.

fields.definition_en: Used when something is said to be true but has not been proved.
fields.example_en: He was arrested for allegedly stealing a car.
fields.example_vi: Anh ta đã bị bắt vì bị cho là đã lấy trộm một chiếc xe hơi.
fields.mnemonic: Adverb form of allege; doing something based on an unproven claim.

fields.meaning_vi: sự liên minh, khối đồng minh
fields.definition_en: An agreement to work with someone else to try to achieve the same thing.
fields.example_en: The two countries formed a military alliance.
fields.example_vi: Hai quốc gia đã thành lập một liên minh quân sự.
fields.mnemonic: When allies join together, they form an alliance.

fields.definition_en: To give something to someone as their share of a total amount, to use in a particular way.
fields.example_en: The government is allocating £10 million for health education.
fields.example_vi: Chính phủ đang phân bổ 10 triệu bảng Anh cho giáo dục sức khỏe.
fields.mnemonic: To put something in a specific LOCATION for someone is to ALLOCATE it.

fields.meaning_vi: sự phân bổ, phần được cấp
fields.definition_en: The act or process of giving a share of something; the share itself.
fields.example_en: The allocation of resources is a difficult task.
fields.example_vi: Việc phân bổ nguồn lực là một nhiệm vụ khó khăn.
fields.mnemonic: Noun form of the verb allocate.

fields.definition_en: Money that you are given regularly, especially to pay for a particular thing.
fields.example_en: The baggage allowance is 20 kilos per passenger.
fields.example_vi: Hạn mức hành lý là 20 kg mỗi hành khách.
fields.mnemonic: Something you are ALLOWED to have.

fields.definition_en: A country that has agreed officially to give help and support to another one, especially during a war; or someone who helps and supports someone else.
fields.example_en: He is generally considered to be the prime minister's closest political ally.
fields.example_vi: Ông thường được coi là đồng minh chính trị thân cận nhất của thủ tướng.
fields.mnemonic: An ALLY stands by you in the ALLEY when there's a fight.

fields.definition_en: A chemical element that is a light, silver-coloured metal, used especially for making cooking equipment and aircraft parts.
fields.example_en: We recycle all our aluminium cans.
fields.example_vi: Chúng tôi tái chế tất cả các lon nhôm của mình.
fields.mnemonic: UK spelling of aluminum.

fields.definition_en: Taking part in an activity for pleasure, not as a job.
fields.example_en: He was an amateur photographer until he started getting paid for his work.
fields.example_vi: Anh ấy là một nhiếp ảnh gia nghiệp dư cho đến khi anh ấy bắt đầu được trả tiền cho công việc của mình.
fields.mnemonic: Someone who does it for AMore (love), not money.

fields.definition_en: An important official who works in a foreign country representing his or her own country there, and who is officially accepted in this position by that country.
fields.example_en: She's a former US ambassador to the UN.
fields.example_vi: Bà là cựu đại sứ Hoa Kỳ tại Liên Hợp Quốc.
fields.mnemonic: An ambassador goes ABROAD to represent their country.

fields.definition_en: To change the words of a text, especially a law or a legal document.
fields.example_en: Until the constitution is amended, the power to appoint ministers will remain with the president.
fields.example_vi: Cho đến khi hiến pháp được sửa đổi, quyền bổ nhiệm các bộ trưởng sẽ vẫn thuộc về tổng thống.
fields.mnemonic: To mend a text by making changes.

fields.definition_en: A change or changes made to the words of a text.
fields.example_en: He insisted that the book did not need amendment.
fields.example_vi: Ông ấy khăng khăng rằng cuốn sách không cần sửa đổi.
fields.mnemonic: Noun form of amend.

fields.definition_en: In the middle of or surrounded by.
fields.example_en: On the floor, amid mounds of books, were two small envelopes.
fields.example_vi: Trên sàn nhà, giữa những đống sách, là hai chiếc phong bì nhỏ.
fields.mnemonic: In the MIDdle of -> aMID.

fields.meaning_vi: sự tương tự, phép loại suy
fields.definition_en: A comparison between things that have similar features, often used to help explain a principle or idea.
fields.example_en: He drew an analogy between the brain and a vast computer.
fields.example_vi: Anh ấy đã rút ra một sự tương tự giữa bộ não và một chiếc máy tính khổng lồ.
fields.mnemonic: An ALOGY (logical) comparison.

fields.meaning_vi: mỏ neo, người/vật làm chỗ dựa
fields.definition_en: A heavy metal object, usually shaped like a cross with curved arms, on a strong rope or chain, that is dropped from a boat into the water to prevent the boat from moving away.
fields.example_en: We dropped anchor in a quiet bay.
fields.example_vi: Chúng tôi thả neo trong một vịnh yên tĩnh.
fields.mnemonic: An ANCHOR keeps you ANCHORED to a spot.

fields.definition_en: A spiritual being in some religions who is believed to be a messenger of God, usually represented as having a human form with wings.
fields.example_en: According to the story, an angel appeared to her in a dream.
fields.example_vi: Theo câu chuyện, một thiên thần đã hiện ra với cô trong một giấc mơ.
fields.mnemonic: A divine messenger.

fields.definition_en: Made or done by someone whose name is not known or not made public.
fields.example_en: The money was donated by an anonymous benefactor.
fields.example_vi: Số tiền được quyên góp bởi một nhà hảo tâm giấu tên.
fields.mnemonic: A (without) + nym (name). Without a name.

fields.definition_en: A set of equipment or tools or a machine that is used for a particular purpose.
fields.example_en: The divers checked their breathing apparatus.
fields.example_vi: Các thợ lặn đã kiểm tra thiết bị thở của họ.
fields.mnemonic: An apparatus is an instrument or tool that appears to help you do something.

fields.definition_en: Attractive or interesting.
fields.example_en: The idea of not having to get up early every morning is rather appealing.
fields.example_vi: Ý tưởng không phải dậy sớm mỗi sáng khá là hấp dẫn.
fields.mnemonic: If something appeals to you, it is appealing.

fields.meaning_vi: sự thèm ăn, lòng khao khát
fields.definition_en: The feeling that you want to eat food, or a strong desire or need.
fields.example_en: All that walking has given me an appetite.
fields.example_vi: Việc đi bộ nhiều như vậy đã khiến tôi có cảm giác thèm ăn.
fields.mnemonic: Appetizers are served before a meal to give you an appetite.

fields.meaning_vi: vỗ tay tán thưởng, ca ngợi
fields.definition_en: To show enjoyment or approval of something such as a performance or speech by clapping the hands repeatedly to make a noise.
fields.example_en: The audience warmly applauded the performance.
fields.example_vi: Khán giả đã nhiệt liệt vỗ tay tán thưởng màn trình diễn.
fields.mnemonic: When you applaud, you give applause.

fields.meaning_vi: có thể áp dụng, thích hợp
fields.definition_en: Affecting or relating to a person or thing.
fields.example_en: This part of the law is only applicable to companies employing more than five people.
fields.example_vi: Phần luật này chỉ có thể áp dụng đối với các công ty sử dụng hơn năm người.
fields.mnemonic: Able to be applied.

fields.definition_en: To choose someone officially for a job or responsibility.
fields.example_en: He's just been appointed as director of the publishing division.
fields.example_vi: Anh ấy vừa được bổ nhiệm làm giám đốc bộ phận xuất bản.
fields.mnemonic: To point at someone and say 'you have the job'.

fields.meaning_vi: sự đánh giá cao, sự biết ơn
fields.definition_en: The act of recognizing or understanding that something is valuable, important, or as described.
fields.example_en: I would like to express my appreciation for all your hard work.
fields.example_vi: Tôi muốn bày tỏ sự biết ơn đối với tất cả sự chăm chỉ của bạn.
fields.mnemonic: Noun form of appreciate.

fields.definition_en: Based on chance rather than being planned or based on reason.
fields.example_en: The choice of players for the team seemed completely arbitrary.
fields.example_vi: Việc lựa chọn cầu thủ cho đội có vẻ hoàn toàn tùy tiện.
fields.mnemonic: An arbiter makes a decision, sometimes it feels arbitrary (random).

fields.definition_en: Relating to architecture.
fields.example_en: The city is famous for its diverse architectural styles.
fields.example_vi: Thành phố nổi tiếng với các phong cách kiến trúc đa dạng.
fields.mnemonic: Adjective form of architecture.

fields.definition_en: A collection of historical records relating to a place, organization, or family.
fields.example_en: These old photographs should go in the family archive.
fields.example_vi: Những bức ảnh cũ này nên được đưa vào kho lưu trữ của gia đình.
fields.mnemonic: Like a 'hive' for 'art' and old things -> archive.

fields.definition_en: A large, flat area surrounded by seats used for sports or entertainment.
fields.example_en: The rock band played to a packed arena.
fields.example_vi: Ban nhạc rock đã chơi cho một đấu trường chật cứng khán giả.
fields.mnemonic: An area where events happen.

fields.meaning_vi: được cho là, có thể nói là
fields.definition_en: Used when stating an opinion or belief that you think can be shown to be true.
fields.example_en: He is arguably the best player in the world.
fields.example_vi: Anh ấy có thể nói là cầu thủ giỏi nhất thế giới.
fields.mnemonic: You can 'argue' that it is true.

fields.meaning_vi: trang bị vũ khí, trang bị
fields.definition_en: To provide yourself or others with a weapon or weapons.
fields.example_en: The police were armed with riot shields.
fields.example_vi: Cảnh sát đã được trang bị khiên chống bạo động.
fields.mnemonic: To put an 'arm' (weapon) in your hand.

fields.definition_en: A large group of things or people, especially one that is attractive or causes admiration.
fields.example_en: They sat before an array of microphones and cameras.
fields.example_vi: Họ ngồi trước một loạt các micrô và máy ảnh.
fields.mnemonic: A ray of light has an array of colors.

fields.definition_en: To express in words.
fields.example_en: I found myself unable to articulate my feelings.
fields.example_vi: Tôi thấy mình không thể diễn đạt rõ ràng cảm xúc của mình.
fields.mnemonic: An article expresses things clearly. To articulate is to express clearly.

fields.definition_en: The soft grey or black powder that is left after a dead body, coal, wood, etc. has burnt.
fields.example_en: The volcano spewed ash into the air.
fields.example_vi: Núi lửa phun tro vào không trung.
fields.mnemonic: What is left when you burn an object to a clash.

fields.definition_en: Something that you hope to achieve.
fields.example_en: I've never had any political aspirations.
fields.example_vi: Tôi chưa bao giờ có bất kỳ khát vọng chính trị nào.
fields.mnemonic: You aspire (verb) to reach your aspiration (noun).

fields.meaning_vi: thiết tha mong mỏi, khao khát
fields.definition_en: To want something very much or hope to achieve something or be successful.
fields.example_en: Many young players aspire to play for the national team.
fields.example_vi: Nhiều cầu thủ trẻ khao khát được chơi cho đội tuyển quốc gia.
fields.mnemonic: Aiming high, stretching upwards like a spire.

fields.definition_en: The murder of someone famous or important.
fields.example_en: The assassination of the president shocked the nation.
fields.example_vi: Vụ ám sát tổng thống đã gây chấn động cả nước.
fields.mnemonic: Two 'ass'es (donkeys) committing a sin against a nation -> ass-ass-i-nation.

fields.definition_en: A violent attack.
fields.example_en: He was charged with sexual assault.
fields.example_vi: Anh ta bị buộc tội tấn công tình dục.
fields.mnemonic: Sounds like 'a salt'. You throw 'a salt' to attack someone's eyes.

fields.definition_en: To come together in a single place or bring parts together in a single group.
fields.example_en: We assembled in the meeting room after lunch.
fields.example_vi: Chúng tôi đã tập hợp trong phòng họp sau bữa trưa.
fields.mnemonic: Avengers, ASSEMBLE!

fields.definition_en: A group of people, especially one that meets regularly for a particular purpose, such as government, or the process of putting together the parts of a machine.
fields.example_en: The UN General Assembly voted on the resolution.
fields.example_vi: Đại hội đồng Liên Hợp Quốc đã bỏ phiếu về nghị quyết.
fields.mnemonic: Noun form of assemble.

fields.definition_en: To say that something is certainly true.
fields.example_en: He asserts that she stole money from him.
fields.example_vi: Anh ấy khẳng định rằng cô ta đã ăn cắp tiền của anh ấy.
fields.mnemonic: To put a 'cert' (certain) statement out there is to assert it.

fields.definition_en: A statement that you strongly believe is true.
fields.example_en: I certainly don't agree with his assertion that men are better drivers than women.
fields.example_vi: Tôi chắc chắn không đồng ý với sự khẳng định của anh ấy rằng nam giới lái xe giỏi hơn nữ giới.
fields.mnemonic: Noun form of assert.

fields.meaning_vi: sự đảm bảo, sự tự tin
fields.definition_en: A promise; or a feeling of confidence.
fields.example_en: She gave me her assurance that she would sign the contract immediately.
fields.example_vi: Cô ấy đã cho tôi sự đảm bảo rằng cô ấy sẽ ký hợp đồng ngay lập tức.
fields.mnemonic: To make sure -> assure -> assurance.

fields.meaning_vi: nơi tị nạn, nhà thương điên
fields.definition_en: Protection or safety, especially that given by a government to people who have been forced to leave their own countries for their safety or because of war.
fields.example_en: He applied for political asylum.
fields.example_vi: Ông ta đã nộp đơn xin tị nạn chính trị.
fields.mnemonic: A place of safety where you seek refuge.

fields.definition_en: An extremely cruel, violent, or shocking act.
fields.example_en: They are on trial for committing atrocities against the civilian population.
fields.example_vi: Họ đang bị xét xử vì phạm tội ác tàn bạo đối với dân thường.
fields.mnemonic: An ATROCIOUS city is full of ATROCITIES.

fields.definition_en: To reach or succeed in getting something.
fields.example_en: He has attained the highest grade in his music exams.
fields.example_vi: Anh ấy đã đạt được điểm cao nhất trong các kỳ thi âm nhạc của mình.
fields.mnemonic: At a train: you take a train to ATTAIN your destination.

fields.meaning_vi: sự tham dự, số người tham dự
fields.definition_en: The fact of going somewhere such as a church, school, etc. regularly; or the number of people present at an event.
fields.example_en: Attendance at lectures is compulsory.
fields.example_vi: Việc tham dự các bài giảng là bắt buộc.
fields.mnemonic: Noun form of attend.

fields.definition_en: A lawyer, especially one who can act for someone in court.
fields.example_en: He hired a defense attorney.
fields.example_vi: Anh ta đã thuê một luật sư bào chữa.
fields.mnemonic: An attorney represents you at a tourney (court battle).

fields.definition_en: To say or think that something is the result of a particular thing.
fields.example_en: He attributed his success to hard work.
fields.example_vi: Anh ấy cho rằng thành công của mình là do làm việc chăm chỉ.
fields.mnemonic: To give TRIBUTE to the cause of something.

fields.definition_en: An official examination of the accounts of a business.
fields.example_en: The company conducts an annual audit of its finances.
fields.example_vi: Công ty tiến hành kiểm toán tài chính hàng năm.
fields.mnemonic: An auditor does the audit.
